modification: planner_declared.tool_calls[0].args.projection.rate_limit_per_sec and payload_derived[0].projection.rate_limit_per_sec are the IEEE-754 float 0.5. A conformant SEP-2787 canonicaliser MUST reject this at the boundary. Use scaled integers or decimal strings instead.
notes: No canonical_signing_input.bin or signed_envelope.json is produced because the canonicaliser refuses the input. The unsigned envelope is provided so a second implementation can attempt canonicalisation and confirm rejection.
